major_changes: TC4OuterLandsMazeGenerator now ports original DFS/backtracking maze algorithm instead of fixed 7x7 ring
MazeThread-style coordinate copy contract added to generateAt(centerX, centerZ, width, height, seed)
TC4OuterLandsMazeSavedData persists labyrinth Data.cells, portalOrigins and generatedCells
Feature dispatch moved to TC4OuterLandsFeatureSelector but preserves MazeHandler.generateEldritch ids
GenCommon.PAT_CONNECT 11x11 matrix and depth/justTheTip loops ported
Dedicated invisible EldritchNothingBlock replaces barrier placeholder for blockEldritchNothing
Live Outer Lands generation expands around player maze cells, not only portal center
known_limits: Gradle compile not executed because sandbox cannot download Gradle wrapper
GenBossRoom/GenKeyRoom are still shell adapters and should be deepened next
blockEldritch metadata variants still need full variant block/state parity
